title: 夷陵之火
synopsis: 刘备得知二弟关羽被孙权伏杀，收到关羽青龙偃月刀残件后悲愤交加，不顾丞相诸葛亮的苦苦劝阻，执意下达伐吴的命令，决意要为兄弟报仇雪恨。

scenes.title: 议事殿定策
scenes.setting: 蜀汉皇宫议事殿，上午辰时，春末微暖，刘备收到关羽的青龙偃月刀残件后召诸葛亮议事，决意伐吴

shots.visual_description: Liu Bei, 62-year-old male, silver long hair tied in a man's bun fixed with gilded dragon jade crown, three strands of silver beard reaching chest, wearing bright yellow cross-collar wide-sleeve Shu brocade dragon robe embroidered with five-clawed golden dragon dark pattern, slams the broken Green Dragon Crescent Blade of Guan Yu heavily on the bronze imperial desk, veins popping on the back of his hand, blurred scrolls and blurred unreadable documents scattered on the desk, shallow depth of field
prop_refs: 关羽的青龙偃月刀残件
shots.lighting: warm natural light from outside the hall mixed with warm yellow flame light from bronze lamps
shots.color_tone: heavy desaturated amber and dark brown
shots.atmosphere_sound: loud thud of metal hitting wood, quiet rustle of clothes, distant wind blowing through the hall
shots.dialogue_text: 孙权小儿害我二弟，此仇不共戴天！

shots.visual_description: Zhuge Liang, 42-year-old male, ink-black long hair tied in a man's bun fixed with suet jade crown, three strands of black beard reaching abdomen, wearing moon white cross-collar wide-sleeve Shu brocade official robe embroidered with cloud pattern, holds white feather fan in his hand, kneels on one knee in front of the desk, bows his head slightly to plead, blurred red lacquer dragon pillar in the background, shallow depth of field
shots.lighting: warm natural light from outside the hall mixed with warm yellow flame light from bronze lamps
shots.color_tone: heavy desaturated amber and dark brown
shots.atmosphere_sound: soft rustle of official robe fabric, faint crackle of bronze lamp flame
shots.dialogue_text: 陛下！曹魏才是国贼，此时伐吴只会让曹魏坐收渔利，万不可冲动啊！

shots.visual_description: Liu Bei, 62-year-old male, silver long hair tied in a man's bun fixed with gilded dragon jade crown, three strands of silver beard reaching chest, wearing bright yellow cross-collar wide-sleeve Shu brocade dragon robe embroidered with five-clawed golden dragon dark pattern, stands up abruptly, picks up the unreadable blurred official document of punitive expedition against Wu from the desk, holds it high in the air, eyes bloodshot with rage, blurred imperial guard holding halberd standing in the distance in the background, shallow depth of field
shots.lighting: warm natural light from outside the hall mixed with warm yellow flame light from bronze lamps
shots.color_tone: heavy desaturated amber and dark brown
shots.atmosphere_sound: fierce wind blowing through the hall, faint rubbing sound of paper, suppressed breathing of guards
shots.dialogue_text: 朕意已决！即刻传朕旨意，举全国之兵伐吴，谁敢再谏，定斩不饶！
